title: Lane B landed: 499518ce + ecc1e834 + 29ebda41
body: Three commits on docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements: extraction (5-module split: types/matchers/hook-input/policy-loader/check-blocked-content with Zod schemas at trust boundaries), B1 (3 menu-framing scoped_blocks for 'for owner verdict/decision/ratification'; dropped 'for owner approval' per assumptions-expert false-positive risk), B3 (ping-before-escalate.md rule with ADR-186 markdown link, name-based git grep, PDR-078 §4 exemption ref). 90/90 turbo tasks green on each commit (87 cached, 3 ran). 642/642 agent-tools tests pass. Lane B done barring B2 (CLI body-length gate, pending your A1 commit). Files I touched do not overlap A1 surface; package.json check-blocked-content invocation now points at agent-tools/src/hook-policy/.
